original text:
Our team of multi-talented individuals passionately pursue their goal to create the best visual experiences. They are also highly informative on production-related challenges faced by filmmakers, and offer advice and recommendations through experience. Our production team consists of Production Designers, Production Managers, Art Directors, Cameramen, Location Managers, Technical Crew, Digital Media Experts and Directors. This wide range of expertise allows us to offer clients realistic budget preparations for any type of project, together with additional services such as location scouting as well as obtaining location permits and approvals, making the entire process.
From concept to delivery, Frames TV and Film Production ensures that the filmmakers will experience an equally thrilling and enjoyable journey through the production lifecycle by offering the most convenient and cost effective production services that a unit can offer.

original text:
Despite the best of processes, policies and intentions, mistakes happen, especially in the fast paced world of human resources. When unforced errors like missed deadlines occur, responding quickly and expertly makes all the difference.
This complimentary webinar will examine a number of common human resource areas that can become extremely problematic without constant monitoring and follow-up and what HR professionals can do to mitigate any potential liability before it's too late.
This webinar, which is part of the firm's Sophisticated Employer Webinar Series, is designed to benefit business owners, executives and human resources professionals.
This activity was approved by the HR Certification Institute for 1.25 (general) recertification credits toward the aPHR®, PHR®, PHRca®, SPHR®, GPHR®, PHRi® and SPHRi® certifications. The use of this seal confirms that this activity has met HR Certification Institute's® (HRCI®) criteria for recertification credit pre-approval.
This seal may be used exclusively for activities that have been pre-approved by HRCI. This approval is valid through 5/9/2019 and is not transferable.
Click here to attend the Mitigating Mistakes webinar.

original text:
Amin is a sophomore at Union College; he studies biomedical engineering and economics. He is from Cairo, Egypt. During High School, Amin was heavily involved in Model United Nations conferences and his High School's Students Union. He has always been enthusiastic about entrepreneurship. Last winter, He started his own customized apparel company in Egypt.
At Union, he is involved in the school's newspaper, the student investment fund, Arabian culture club, and TEDX@Union College, which he co-founded last year. Amin is an ambitious student who aspires to have a career in finance and to one day start his own investment firm.
This page was last modified on 19 October 2018, at 19:28.

original text:
Commemorate the birth of your baby or children with a birthstone that symbolizes the month of their birthday! Their birthday is unique to them and deserve to be celebrated and remembered with a custom-designed ring with colored birthstones and personalized engravings.
Life is made of unique moments and memories, and the birthday of your child is an unforgettable day for the rest of your life. Show your love and dedication to your children with one of Jewelry Liquidations' baby and children celebratory birthstone rings. Choosing a ring from our collection of golden rings, with birthstones and unique engravings is a way to remember the birthday of your children forever.
Share the birthday of your baby and children with your relatives and friends by selecting a ring below that best tells the story of your new family member.

original text:
The New England Tigers maintained their perfect Region 7 mark with three wins in the Region tournament last week. New England's first tournament win knocked Hazen out of the tournament and their second knocked out Hettinger-Scranton, setting up a showdown with the Dickinson Trinity Titans.
Trinity got to the finals by topping Killdeer and Heart River during their first two tournament games, but getting a third tournament win proved too tough even though Trinity was playing on its home floor. They fell 58-48, giving New England a coveted state playoff berth.
The game was typical of a Region 7 championship game with both teams alternating turns in the lead but, at the end of three rounds, New England was slightly ahead 40-37. New England came out looking like a boxer or UFC fighter in the final round of a close bout.
New England was looking for the knock-out punch and started the quarter on a 6-2 run that had deceiving importance. The run put New England up 46-39 with about five minutes left in the game.
Trinity responded with a Brock Messer put-back basket with 3:40 left, cutting New England's lead to five, 46-41. But Trinity 3-point marksman Willy Jahner couldn't deliver the momentum counter 3-pointer to pull Trinity within two.
New England attacked off the Trinity miss, adding two buckets and making the score 50-41. Trinity Head Coach Gregg Grinsteinner called a timeout to regroup and give a final push with 2:06 left in the game, but it was too late.
processed_text:
The New England Tigers maintained their perfect Region 7 mark with three wins in the Region tournament last week.
New England's first tournament win knocked Hazen out of the tournament and their second knocked out Hettinger-Scranton, setting up a showdown with the Dickinson Trinity Titans.
Trinity got to the finals by topping Killdeer and Heart River during their first two tournament games, but getting a third tournament win proved too tough even though Trinity was playing on its home floor.
They fell 58-48, giving New England a coveted state playoff berth.
The game was typical of a Region 7 championship game with both teams alternating turns in the lead but, at the end of three rounds, New England was slightly ahead 40-37.
New England came out looking like a boxer or UFC fighter in the final round of a close bout.
New England was looking for the knock-out punch and started the quarter on a 6-2 run that had deceiving importance.
The run put New England up 46-39 with about five minutes left in the game.
Trinity responded with a Brock Messer put-back basket with 3:40 left, cutting New England's lead to five, 46-41.
But Trinity 3-point marksman Willy Jahner couldn't deliver the momentum counter 3-pointer to pull Trinity within two.
New England attacked off the Trinity miss, adding two buckets and making the score 50-41.
Trinity Head Coach Gregg Grinsteinner called a timeout to regroup and give a final push with 2:06 left in the game, but it was too late.

original text: Every theatre artist must be both a critic and a creator. The mission of the Department of Theatre Arts is to provide our majors with a thorough grounding in the theory and practice of theatre. The curriculum places particular emphasis on developing aesthetic awareness of the individual theatrical arts and exploring their collaborative relationships. The program is designed to prepare students for careers in a variety of fields, including the entertainment industry, education, and business.
processed_text:
Every theatre artist must be both a critic and a creator.
The mission of the Department of Theatre Arts is to provide our majors with a thorough grounding in the theory and practice of theatre.
The curriculum places particular emphasis on developing aesthetic awareness of the individual theatrical arts and exploring their collaborative relationships.
The program is designed to prepare students for careers in a variety of fields, including the entertainment industry, education, and business.

original text: Setia Movers Hong Kong Limited is committed to complying with the requirements of the Hong Kong Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance. Your personal data we collected is for use in connection with your moving enquiry and our service only. No personal data will be disclosed to third parties except as authorised or required by law. If you do not wish to receive communications from us, please inform us to have your contact details removed from our mailing lists. We will take measures to secure your personal data.
processed_text:
Setia Movers Hong Kong Limited is committed to complying with the requirements of the Hong Kong Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance.
Your personal data we collected is for use in connection with your moving enquiry and our service only.
No personal data will be disclosed to third parties except as authorised or required by law.
If you do not wish to receive communications from us, please inform us to have your contact details removed from our mailing lists.
We will take measures to secure your personal data.

original text:
The baby of the family, our mini palm leaf bowl is suitable for desserts and finger foods, and as a bowl for nibbles. 100% natural, made from the fallen leaves of the Areca palm (Betel nut palm tree, not the Palm tree from which palm oil is made!). Leaves are individually cleaned, heat pressed and then trimmed into shape. No chemicals are used during this process and no trees are cut down. Green catering companies love these 100% biodegradable plates - each of which is unique and beautiful. Perfect for a natural green wedding Palm leaf plates are easily home compostable.
Size: Small 12cm. 3cm deep.

Leaves are individually cleaned, heat pressed and then trimmed into shape.
No chemicals are used during this process and no trees are cut down.
Green catering companies love these 100% biodegradable plates - each of which is unique and beautiful.

Size: Small 12cm.
3cm deep.

how does it work, what does it entail and why you should purchase this program?? Below is a comprehensive review of autolotto processor.
other software that are based on theories and guesswork, autolotto processor is based on techniques that have been tested and proven to work. The autolotto processor emulates the personal success that Richard had for over 20 years of playing lotto. However he did not create this software on his own. He had a team of competent professionals including three computer scientist, four advanced lotto game experts and 5 staticians who carefully analyzed his lotto personal winning system. His team of experts designed a computer program that has up to date helped many people win major lotto prizes. Autolotto processor can be access from any smartphones, computer and tablets. This software will help you generate lottery numbers that will greatly improve your chances of winning. It will pick numbers for you that have high probabilities of winning than just choosing random numbers. The autolotto processor is a highly efficient software that has the ability to analyze winning numbers probabilities on your behalf. Autolotto processor will pick successful jackpot patterns and historical data and it will use that information to generate the numbers that will increase your probability of winning. The good news about this software that has been designed by Richard Lustig is that it does not require you buy or download any additional tool because it comes with everything that you need to help you win lotto prizes.
